title: Quiz: Tensor Products
description: Test your understanding of tensor products and multi-qubit quantum systems

questions.question: What is the dimension of the state space for a 4-qubit quantum system?
questions.explanation: For n qubits, the state space dimension is 2^n. For 4 qubits: 2^4 = 16.

questions.question: What is |1⟩ ⊗ |0⟩ in vector form?
questions.explanation: |1⟩ ⊗ |0⟩ = |10⟩. The four basis states |00⟩, |01⟩, |10⟩, |11⟩ correspond to positions 0, 1, 2, 3 respectively. So |10⟩ = (0, 0, 1, 0)ᵀ.

questions.question: If A is a 2×2 matrix and B is a 2×2 matrix, what is the size of A ⊗ B?
questions.explanation: For an m×n matrix A and p×q matrix B, A ⊗ B has size (mp)×(nq). Here: (2×2)×(2×2) = 4×4.

questions.question: The tensor product is commutative: |a⟩ ⊗ |b⟩ = |b⟩ ⊗ |a⟩ for all states |a⟩ and |b⟩.
questions.explanation: False! The tensor product is NOT commutative. For example, |0⟩ ⊗ |1⟩ = |01⟩ ≠ |10⟩ = |1⟩ ⊗ |0⟩.

questions.question: Which of the following states is entangled (cannot be written as a tensor product)?
questions.explanation: The Bell state (|00⟩ + |11⟩)/√2 is entangled. Options a, b, and d are all explicitly written as tensor products of single-qubit states, so they are separable.

questions.question: What is (X ⊗ I)|01⟩, where X is the Pauli-X gate?
questions.explanation: Using the mixed product property: (X ⊗ I)|01⟩ = (X ⊗ I)(|0⟩ ⊗ |1⟩) = X|0⟩ ⊗ I|1⟩ = |1⟩ ⊗ |1⟩ = |11⟩.

questions.question: The mixed product property states that (A ⊗ B)(C ⊗ D) = (AC) ⊗ (BD).
questions.explanation: True! This is the mixed product property, which is extremely useful when computing how multi-qubit gates act on tensor product states.

questions.question: Which of the following are true about tensor products? (Select all that apply)

options.text: They are associative: (A ⊗ B) ⊗ C = A ⊗ (B ⊗ C)
They are bilinear: (αu) ⊗ v = α(u ⊗ v)
They preserve normalization: if |ψ⟩ and |φ⟩ are normalized, so is |ψ⟩ ⊗ |φ⟩
They are commutative: A ⊗ B = B ⊗ A

questions.explanation: a) True - tensor products are associative. b) True - tensor products are bilinear (linear in both arguments). c) True - if ⟨ψ|ψ⟩ = 1 and ⟨φ|φ⟩ = 1, then (⟨ψ| ⊗ ⟨φ|)(|ψ⟩ ⊗ |φ⟩) = ⟨ψ|ψ⟩⟨φ|φ⟩ = 1. d) False - tensor products are NOT commutative.
